features: PACK OF 3: Indulge in this 500ml moisturising hand wash, Vegan Friendly and enriched with Elements Pink Blossom and Lotus Flower extracts
KEY FEATURES: Experience the lovely combination of pink blossom and lotus flower while keeping your hands clean and nourished
VEGAN FORMULA: A plant-based product that is gentle on your skin while providing a luxurious sensory experience during hand washing
SOOTHING SCENT: Enjoy the delicate floral fragrance of pink blossom and lotus flower every time you cleanse your hands with this refreshing formula
HAND CARE ESSENTIALS: Elevate your daily hand hygiene routine with this pack of 3 vegan-friendly, moisturising hand washes enriched with stunning botanical extracts
description: Product Description An exotic fragrance blend of lotus flower, pink fruits and coconut water with nourishing vitamin E. This luxurious hand wash leaves your hands feeling refreshed and beautifully fragranced. Inspired by the most covetable trends in interior design, our sophisticated Elements collection references exquisite natural textures with striking marble tones. This premium collection complements every home, from urban glam to Nordic simplicity and sleek minimalism. An exotic fragrance blend of lotus flower, pink fruits and coconut water infused with nourishing Vitamin E. Both refreshing, floral and a touch of tropical to uplift the senses. Ingredients Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycerin, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid, Potassium Sorbate, Peg-150 Distearate, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Tocopheryl Acetate, Sodium Hydroxide, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Hexylene Glycol. Directions Lather & Rinse Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. If product gets in the eyes rinse immediately with clean warm water. Excessive use or prolonged exposure can cause irritation to skin and urinary tract. If skin irritation occurs discontinue use. If irritation persists consult your doctor. Manufacturer Contact Information Nash Road, Redditch, B98 7AS See more
